---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest a clarification or improvement to documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Documentation area

Which document, section, or example should be improved?

Examples:

- README
- Roadmap
- Worker AI model
- Safety boundaries
- Maintainer workflow
- Read-only inventory example
- Documentation-only task example

## Current problem

What is unclear, missing, too complex, or misleading?

## Suggested improvement

Describe the change you suggest.

## Audience

Who would this help?

```text
new maintainer / small OSS team / AI worker user / reviewer / other
```

## Safety or privacy concerns

Could the documentation encourage unsafe AI worker behavior or expose sensitive data?

```text
YES / NO / UNCLEAR
```

If yes, explain.

## Additional context

Add context if useful. Do not include private data or secrets.
